full_text:
You Chu (Zhongyun) 游楚 (仲允)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
You Chu (游楚), styledZhongyun (仲允), was born in Zuopingyi. Served in office till his death aged over 70. Humane governor who hated executions. You Chu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
